use_cases: User authentication and login for web applications
Account access form with email and password validation
Dark-themed UI sign-in screens for modern SaaS products
ai_summary: A sleek dark-themed sign-in form featuring glass-morphism styling with backdrop blur effects and gradient accents. The component includes email and password input fields with client-side validation, error messaging, and a branded interface for HextaUI. Designed as a complete authentication flow component suitable for modern SaaS applications with a premium dark aesthetic.
